function.message: Handled the next inbox item by running the four requested finance documents through the OCR/frontmatter workflow. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to each target file while preserving each original note body verbatim, then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read 99_system workflows and finance schema before edits, preserved full original bodies below frontmatter, and deleted inbox file only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR four listed finance records. Each file contained all required schema fields (invoice/bill core fields and line items), enabling exact extraction into YAML frontmatter per finance schema without guessing. All four files were updated and the processed inbox item was deleted per inbox workflow.
